title: mob battles modpack
description: A modpack which adds alot of new mobs and the mob battles mod.
body:
A modpack which adds mods that add alot more mobs, and the mob battles mod, so the mobs can fight


it adds mods like the [mutant mobs mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/mutant-monsters) and the [illager invasion](https://modrinth.com/mod/illager-invasion) mod
